text:
ヴォル・ドラゴン相手に接近戦って
なかなか迫力あるよねー。

見てるわたしのほうが
ハラハラしちゃったけど
いい訓練になったでしょ？

もっともっとすごい訓練用メニューも
考えてるとこなんだー。

カタナの腕を上げたいなら
またおい

Vol Dragon's are really something when you're
right up in their faces, huh?

I'll tell you, it was getting hard to sit still
just watching.
But it turned out to be great practice, right?

I'll have an even more spectacular plan put
together by the next time we meet, I promise.

Drop on by next time you're looking to step up
your katana game.
